_comment: Per-scene savestate corpus for qa_ci.py. Add a scene = one row. Fields: name (label), state (.mcs path, relative to repo root), mode (gameplay|cutscene|ui), slots (pool walk depth), note. mode drives INV-camera severity: gameplay=HARD, cutscene=ADVISORY (camera scripted away at some beats), ui=no player/camera invariants. Capture fresh per build with qa_ci.py --capture (uses qa_savestate.ps1); analyze stored states instantly otherwise.

scenes.name: ghz_landing_v11
scenes.note: verified-good GHZ landing (regression sentinel: cam~709 vs plr~717 = 8px)

scenes.name: aiz_cutscene
scenes.note: AIZ intro at the Heavies beat (camera pan-back anomaly lives here)
